'''Firejelly''' was an organic weapon used by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Firejelly was a gelatinous, flammable substance that would catch fire very quickly. They were usually given to the [[Chazrach]] slave troops. The substance was also used to [[Torture/Legends|torture]] victims to get answers, or when they want to meld and/or weld substances together.

After the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the Vong took the jelly with them to [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] where the jellies reverted back to their wild forms and disappeared into the [[tampasi]].

{{Weapon-stub}}
